title: Update name/tag embedded into schema1 manifests
body:
This vendors in https://github.com/containers/image/pull/88 , updates tests to pass now that schema1 manifests are being modified by the upload, and enables several tests which were previously broken by our incorrect schema1 support.  Fixes #290 .

Similarly to https://github.com/containers/image/pull/88, depends on, and includes, #336. I will rebase as necessary.

See the individual commit messages for more details.

comments.body: @runcom PTAL as well, merging https://github.com/containers/image/pull/88 without this would break CI.
seems ok to me, we'll see what tests say on CI
